summary: The diff implements most of the required features for both REQ-1 and REQ-2. The backend model is extended with imageSize as optional Text, create/update/query endpoints handle it, and migration handles existing posts. The frontend adds image size selectors to CreateBlogPostPage and EditBlogPostPage with predefined options and custom input, and BlogPostDetailPage renders images with the selected size. However, the implementation only adds a single shared imageSize field rather than separate fields for featured image and content image as specified in the acceptance criteria.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add an image size selector control for EACH image upload field (featured image AND content image separately).
missing_requirements.reason: The frontend files reference a single imageSizeOption state variable, suggesting only one size selector is shared across both images rather than one per image field. The backend also stores only one imageSize field rather than separate values per image.

missing_requirements.requirement: The blog post type includes separate optional image size fields for featuredImageSize and contentImageSize.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend only has a single imageSize optional Text field instead of the two separate fields (featuredImageSize and contentImageSize) specified in the acceptance criteria.
